Name: Register Listening Deployment Target with Octopus
Description: Step template to Register an Listening Deployment Target with Octopus Deploy using the API.  Useful when spinning up machines and you want to wait to register until the machine finishes installing all additional software.
Author: octobob

Parameters.Name: RegisterListeningTarget.Octopus.Base.Url
Parameters.Label: Octopus Base Url
Parameters.HelpText: The base url of your Octopus Deploy instance.  Example: https://samples.octopus.app

Parameters.Name: RegisterListeningTarget.Octopus.Api.Key
Parameters.Label: Octopus Api Key
Parameters.HelpText: The API key of a user in Octopus Deploy who has permissions to register the cluster.

Parameters.Name: RegisterListeningTarget.Machine.Name
Parameters.Label: Machine Name
Parameters.HelpText: The name of the machine to register with Octopus Deploy.

Parameters.Name: RegisterListeningTarget.Machine.Address
Parameters.Label: Machine Address
Parameters.HelpText: The machine address (IP Address or Domain Name) to connect to

Parameters.Name: RegisterListeningTarget.Machine.Port
Parameters.Label: Port Number
Parameters.HelpText: The port the tentacle is listening on

Parameters.Name: RegisterListeningTarget.Roles.List
Parameters.Label: Role CSV List
Parameters.HelpText: Comma separated list of environments to assign to the machine in Octopus Deploy.

Parameters.Name: RegisterListeningTarget.Environment.List
Parameters.Label: Environment CSV List
Parameters.HelpText: Comma separated list of environments to assign to the the machine in Octopus Deploy.

Parameters.Name: RegisterListeningTarget.Tenant.List
Parameters.Label: Tenant CSV List
Parameters.HelpText: (Optional) If this is for a tenant, the a comma separated list of tenants to assign the machine to in Octopus Deploy

Parameters.Name: RegisterListeningTarget.Tenant.DeploymentType
Parameters.Label: Tenanted Deployments
Parameters.HelpText: Choose the kind of deployment where this deployment target should be included.

DisplaySettings.Octopus.SelectOptions:
Untenanted|Exclude from tenanted deployments (default)
Tenanted|Include only in tenanted deployments
TenantedOrUntenanted|Include in both tenanted and untenanted deployments

Parameters.Name: RegisterListeningTarget.MachinePolicy.IdOrName
Parameters.Label: Machine Policy Id Or Name
Parameters.HelpText: Enter in the name or the Id of the Machine Policy in Octopus Deploy for the AKS Cluster.

Parameters.Name: RegisterListeningTarget.Overwrite.Existing
Parameters.Label: Overwrite Existing Registration
Parameters.HelpText: Indicates if the existing listening tentacle should be overwritten in Octopus.
